parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ status: 'error', message: $json.message || 'Unauthorized: Invalid or missing API key' }) }}

={{ ({ status: 'error', message: $input.first().json.message, request_id: $input.first().json.request_id || null, policy: $input.first().json.policy || null, approval: $input.first().json.approval || null }) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ actor: 'approver:' + $input.first().json.approver, action: 'policy_approval', target: $input.first().json.request_id, decision: $input.first().json.auditDecision, payload_jsonb: { request_id: $input.first().json.request_id, policy_id: $input.first().json.policy_id, policy_version: $input.first().json.policy_version, comment: $input.first().json.comment, approved_at: $input.first().json.approved_at, decision: $input.first().json.decision, policy: $input.first().json.policy || {}, approval: $input.first().json.approval || {} }, request_id: $input.first().json.request_id, policy_id: $input.first().json.policy_id, policy_version: $input.first().json.policy_version, policy_reason: $input.first().json.policy_reason, risk_score: $input.first().json.risk_score }) }}
